'use client' import { useState } from 'react' import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Disclosure, DisclosureButton, DisclosurePanel } from '@headlessui/react' import { Bars3Icon, MinusSmallIcon, PlusSmallIcon, XMarkIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline' import { ArrowPathIcon, CheckIcon, CloudArrowUpIcon, Cog6ToothIcon, FingerPrintIcon, LockClosedIcon, ServerIcon, } from '@heroicons/react/20/solid' import BetterVet from '../assets/betterVet.png' import ConstantContact from '../assets/cc.png' import LogMeIn from '../assets/logmein.png' import WFF from '../assets/wff.png' const navigation = [ { name: 'About', href: '#' }, { name: 'Contact', href: '#' }, { name: 'Education', href: '#' }, { name: 'Company', href: '#' }, ] const features = [ { name: 'Deployment Strategy Oversight', description: 'Proficient in managing cloud-based deployment processes.', icon: CloudArrowUpIcon, }, { name: 'Security Compliance Management', description: 'Expertise in overseeing SSL certificate implementations and security compliance.', icon: LockClosedIcon, }, { name: 'Queue System Assistance', description: 'Skilled in guiding customers through simple queue systems and processes.', icon: ArrowPathIcon, }, { name: 'Security Solutions Support', description: 'Able to provide support and information regarding advanced security solutions.', icon: FingerPrintIcon, }, { name: 'API Functionality Assistance', description: 'Proficient in explaining API functionalities and assisting with related issues.', icon: Cog6ToothIcon, }, { name: 'Data Backup Support', description: 'Experienced in addressing customer concerns regarding database backups.', icon: ServerIcon, }, ] function classNames(...classes) { return classes.filter(Boolean).join(' ') } export default function Example() { const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false) return (
